message:
bd-2wds9: Verify distributed/bridge.rs audit (SOUND - Phase 0)

Stale agent a8a4d50 flagged CRITICAL concurrency and MEDIUM bugs.

Verification: Phase 0 stub, not real bugs

1. CRITICAL (sync_state not synchronized): FALSE POSITIVE
   - RegionBridge uses &mut self for all mutations
   - Standard Rust ownership, not meant to be Sync
   - Comment says "accessible for tests"

2. MEDIUM (premature sync reset): PHASE 0 TEST PATH
   - Line 652 explicitly says "sync test path"
   - Real distributed sync not implemented

3. Other findings: Phase 0 incomplete implementation
   - Module provides API surface for testing
   - Real distributed implementation is future work

Agent misunderstood Phase 0 nature and Rust ownership semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
